summary: Go-Live gate testing for iter94. Validated Turnstile guards on /api/auth/login|register|forgot-password (400 no token, 401 invalid), regression on 6 other auth endpoints (verify-otp, verify-2fa, refresh, logout, reset-password, me — all clear of Turnstile). Validated smart image pipeline for kind=post|profile|cover using JWT-minted auth (Turnstile blocks curl login). Landscape 2000x1400 → actual WebP file is 1600x1120 (correct) ; portrait 1200x2400 → 800x1600 (correct) ; thumb 400x400 (<20KB) ; main ≤ 250KB ; profile 512x512 + 128x128 OK ; cover 1280x480 + 640x240 OK. ETag + 304 Not Modified confirmed externally.
verdict: GO LIVE READY with 1 non-blocking bug — API JSON mis-reports width/height for kind=post (returns bounding box 1600x1600 instead of actual 1600x1120 / 800x1600). Actual WebP file bytes are correct so rendering is not broken; but any frontend that uses the numeric width/height from the JSON for layout (e.g. ) will mis-size.

minor.issue: Response JSON main.width / main.height return bounding-box constants (1600,1600) instead of actual post-resize dimensions. Actual WebP file on disk is correct (1600x1120 for landscape 2000x1400, 800x1600 for portrait 1200x2400). Root cause: upload.py L434-438 returns processed['dims']['main'] which is _IMAGE_KINDS[kind][2:4] (mw,mh) instead of main_img.size after thumbnail() fit-resize. Fix: replace with main_img.size inside _process_avatar_or_cover, return dims.main as list(main_img.size).

External preview URL response has Cache-Control: no-store,no-cache,must-revalidate — overridden by preview ingress/CDN. Backend (localhost:8001) correctly sets 'public, max-age=31536000, immutable'. ETag is preserved externally and 304 conditional requests work. NOT a backend bug — infra-level gateway override, likely differs in production behind japapmessenger.com.

action_items: FIX (post-launch OK): upload.py L358/361 — replace processed['dims']['main'] return value with main_img.size (actual) instead of _IMAGE_KINDS[kind] (bounding box). Only affects kind=post (fit mode); profile/cover use cover_resize so values accidentally coincide.

OBSERVE: Cache-Control is being overridden by preview ingress to no-store. Verify production (japapmessenger.com) preserves the 'public, max-age=31536000, immutable' set by backend — otherwise CDN cache won't kick in and image bandwidth budget will blow up.
critical_code_review_comments: middleware/turnstile.py fail-open behaviour when TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY missing is explicitly logged as warning — acceptable for dev, but ensure prod deployment script verifies the env var exists at boot (no silent bypass).

routes/upload.py — the 'fit' crop mode in _process_avatar_or_cover properly preserves aspect (uses thumbnail). However, the dims returned to client (line 380) use the TARGET box values, not the actual image size after fit. Harmless for profile/cover (cover_resize == exact target) but buggy for kind=post.

routes/auth.py — turnstile_token as Optional str in Pydantic + enforcement in endpoint (fail-open if secret missing) is a clean design. Correctly NOT applied to verify-otp / verify-2fa / refresh / reset-password / logout / me — regression confirmed via tests.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/run_auth_upload_test.py (new — direct JWT test bypassing Turnstile for image-pipeline validation)

success_rate.backend: 95% (21/22 functional assertions — only the post-image width/height metadata is wrong)
success_rate.frontend: not tested in this pass — main agent already screenshot-validated /login

Frontend E2E (TurnstileWidget render + feed upload) NOT run — relies on Cloudflare widget auto-solving on trusted hostnames which takes 3-6s per page. Main agent already screenshot-validated /login Turnstile widget. If frontend E2E is needed next pass, use @marsidev/react-turnstile auto-ready callback hook and wait 6s.
rca of the issue: Bug #1 (post metadata): _process_avatar_or_cover returns dims.main = [mw, mh] from _IMAGE_KINDS constant, but for 'fit' crop mode main_img.size after thumbnail() is smaller than (mw, mh). Fix: line 380 `'main': [mw, mh]` → `'main': list(main_img.size)`. 1-line fix. Bug #2 (Cache-Control): preview K8s ingress/CDN injects no-store. Backend is not at fault (confirmed via localhost:8001 returns correct headers).
